History Details

File #: 260422    Version: 1
Type: Resolution
Title: Commemorative Street Name Designation - “Tony Stefani Way” - Falmouth Street Between Folsom Street and Shipley Street
Mover: Chyanne Chen Seconder:
Result: Pass
Agenda note:
Minutes note: Heard in Committee. Speaker(s): Chief Dean Crispen (San Francisco Fire Department); Sam Gebler, President (San Francisco Firefighters Local 798); presented information and answered questions raised throughout the discussion. Stephen Nakajo; spoke in support of the resolution matter. Supervisors Mahood, Melgar, and Chen requested to be added as co-sponsors.
Action: RECOMMENDED
Action text: Vice Chair Chen moved that this Resolution be RECOMMENDED. The motion carried by the following vote:
  • Votes (3:0)
  • 3 records
Person NameVote
Myrna Melgar Aye
Chyanne Chen Aye
Bilal Mahmood Aye
